title: Razoral Reefs
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Razoral Reefs''' were a collection of artificial reefs that formed in the ruins of [[Derem City]], on the planet [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. Anchored by the city's sunspires, the Razoral Reefs provided a refuge for some of Kamino's aquatic lifeforms, especially those that were preyed upon by the ocean world's larger predators.<ref name="GatORW">''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]''</ref>
